Yo, someone has to make a new cheese rooms game because I miss this game like so much пҝјпҝј

To the developer of The Cheeserooms,
Thank you so much for creating this incredible game! I have so many amazing memories of playing The Cheeserooms. The unique concept, the suspenseful atmosphere, and the hilarious jumpscares made it a truly special experience. I especially loved playing with friends, like when we found that secret jumpscare or got our ears blown out by the TV video.
I was so excited to hear that you're working on The Cheeserooms 2. The original game created a lot of great memories for me and my friends, and it would be a shame to not see a sequel come to life. The community is definitely looking forward to it, and I'm sure it will be even better with the new content and improved multiplayer you're planning.
Please know that your hard work is appreciated. We'll be here waiting patiently for The Cheeserooms 2. Keep up the great work!
Sincerely,
A huge fan
